title: Fix fetchWithRetry — attempts not reset between independent calls
fail_to_pass: second call gets full retry budget
resets attempt count for each invocation
pass_to_pass: succeeds on first attempt without retrying
problem_statement: The fetchWithRetry function in src/retry.ts uses a module-level attempts counter that is never reset. After one failed call exhausts the retry budget, subsequent calls immediately throw without making any attempts. Fix it so each call to fetchWithRetry gets its own independent attempt counter.
